mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_logs (user_id, operator_name, action, target_type, target_id, target_name, ip_address, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{operatorName}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{ipAddress}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.user_id AS userId, l.operator_name AS operatorName, l.action, l.target_type AS targetType, l.target_id AS targetId, l.target_name AS targetName, l.ip_address AS ipAddress, l.remark, DATE_FORMAT(l.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM operation_logs l WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM operation_logs WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE operation_logs SET remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM operation_logs WHERE created_at >= CURDATE() GROUP BY action ORDER BY cnt DESC
